creator: agh@riseup.net
text: To enable libgomp in the MinGW GCC-12 variations, MinGW C runtime and headers ports must be configured with "--with-libraries=winpthreads", however, passing this via the ports Makefile results in the configure process reporting "configure: WARNING: unrecognized options: --with-libraries", yet passing this directly to the port in ${WRKSRC} works as expected.
